title: Gargon (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the ships|[[Gargon/Legends|the planet]]}}
[[File:Gargon-TF.png|thumb|right|250px|Transports ''Gargon'' fleeing Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']].]]
'''Gargon''' was group of two [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Gargon 1 & 2'' were apart of two other groups of starships attempting to flee Calamari Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']] before it succumbed to wounds dealt by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Aftermath of Hoth]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
